detail: Started AutoResearch iteration to publish TCN extension and set next benchmark step.
Opened draft PR #6 and selected decision proxy as the next research iteration before TCN safety-loss expansion.
Completed decision proxy outputs and selected sensitivity checks as the next iteration; TCN safety-loss remains gated.
Updated pytest count to 21 and PR head SHA after decision proxy PR update.
Stopped tracking exact PR head SHA inside branch state because every state commit necessarily changes the PR head.
Completed no-retraining sensitivity checks for critical-zone thresholds and decision cost schemas; selected paper claim trace update as the next iteration.
Completed paper claim trace update and deferred TCN safety-loss until manuscript integration or reviewer-triggered need.
